opportunities.rationale: NVDA Q1 FY27 reports May 20 AMC with consensus revenue ~$78-80B (+78% YoY) and EPS ~$1.77; Citi sees $1.4B upside beat. Polymarket assigns ~90% beat probability. Stock at $219.62 (May 19, investing.com) near 52-week high of $223.75. RSI elevated but momentum confirms NVDA has beaten 4/4 last quarters. Invalidated if guidance disappoints or revenue misses $76B floor.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter before close May 20 on dip to $215-220 range; risk-off if VIX spikes above 20 post-FOMC minutes.

opportunities.rationale: WMT Q1 FY27 reports May 21 BMO. Stock at $133.36 (MarketWatch May 19 real-time). Up 19% in 2026 (MarketWatch). Consumer Defensive sector is the #2 weekly performer. Walmart is a defensive bellwether with strong cost discipline and grocery market-share gains. Implied move ~4.98% (options market). Invalidated if management issues cautious guidance citing tariff-driven consumer softness.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter May 20 close on confirmation that NVDA sentiment is positive; re-evaluate if FOMC minutes are hawkish.

opportunities.rationale: TJX Q1 FY27 reports May 20. Stock at $150.91 (TradingEconomics May 19). Off-price retail benefits from trade-down consumer behaviour as tariff uncertainty pressures discretionary spending. Sector rotation into defensive consumer names supports setup. Beat 3+ quarters recently. Invalidated if gross margin compresses beyond guidance due to sourcing cost increases.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter May 19-20 in $148-151 zone; exit after earnings if gap-up exceeds 5%.

opportunities.rationale: LOW Q1 FY27 reports May 21. Stock at $218.02 (MarketWatch May 19). Home improvement a key consumer bellwether with housing starts and building permits also due May 21. HD reported May 19 (EPS $3.43 beat, rev $41.8B beat) but fell -2.49% on margin concerns — LOW may follow lower in sympathy unless it guides better. Invalidated below $205 if housing data disappoints materially.
opportunities.trade_setup: home improvement pair with HD watch
opportunities.entry_trigger: Monitor HD post-market reaction for coattail signal; enter LOW if HD rallies in AH or gap closes.

opportunities.rationale: INTU Q3 FY26 reports ~May 22. Stock at $409.11 (Yahoo Finance May 19). Tax season tailwinds and accelerating AI-powered TurboTax/QuickBooks adoption. Software stocks benefiting from trending bullish regime with S&P above all MAs. Analyst consensus remains Overweight with PTs implying 15%+ upside. Invalidated below $382 if AI monetisation disappoints or enterprise spending slows.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter May 20-21 if market holds gains post-NVDA; avoid day of earnings if VIX exceeds 20.

opportunities.rationale: TGT Q1 FY27 reports May 21 BMO. Stock at $126.55 (Robinhood May 19). Consumer discretionary laggard which lowers the bar for a positive surprise. Barclays PT $115 (bearish), but stock has recovered from lows. Defensive rotation underway; TGT could surprise if grocery/essentials mix improves margins. LOW conviction given sector headwinds and prior guidance cuts. Invalidated below $115 if consumer spending weakens sharply.
opportunities.entry_trigger: Only enter if WMT gaps up positively May 21 — coattail into TGT same day.
